message:
test(views): gate edge_subgraph adj Mapping conversion (franken_networkx-fkzl)

fkzl is the sibling of ukmr: extend the existing parametrized
edge_subgraph adj helpers gate with explicit dict()-conversion equality
checks against networkx so the mapping protocol contract is locked
end-to-end (dict(H.adj) produces {node: filtered-adj}, not ValueError).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
